nodes.label: Online Boutique
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: Cloud-first microservices demo application demonstrating enterprise modernization with Google Cloud products. Composed of 11 microservices communicating over gRPC, used to showcase GKE, CSM, Cloud Operations, Spanner, Memorystore, AlloyDB, and Gemini integrations.

nodes.label: cloudbuild.yaml
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: Google Cloud Build configuration to build and deploy the app into a GKE cluster using Skaffold. Requires Cloud Build service account with Kubernetes Engine Developer role.

nodes.label: skaffold.yaml
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: Skaffold build/deploy configuration for Online Boutique. Supports linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 platforms, multiple build profiles (gcb, debug, network-policies), and kustomize-based manifest management.

nodes.label: .deploystack/test
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: Integration test script for DeployStack's testing rig. Provisions a GKE cluster via Terraform, validates all services are running, tests the frontend HTTP endpoint, then tears down the cluster.

nodes.label: preinit.sh
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: Pre-initialization script that patches terraform.tfvars to rename 'project_id' to 'gcp_project_id' for compatibility.

nodes.label: header-checker-lint.yml
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: Configures the License Header Lint GCF GitHub bot to enforce Apache-2.0 license headers by Google LLC on all source files.

nodes.label: backend-config.yaml
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: BackendConfig for GKE Ingress that associates the frontend with the Cloud Armor security policy 'online-boutique-security-policy'.

nodes.label: frontend-config.yaml
nodes.author: Google LLC
nodes.rationale: FrontendConfig for GKE Ingress that enables HTTPS redirect (MOVED_PERMANENTLY) and applies the 'online-boutique-ssl-policy' SSL policy.

nodes.label: gRPC
nodes.rationale: Inter-service communication protocol used by all 11 microservices in Online Boutique to communicate with each other.

properties.description: Screenshot of the Online Boutique e-commerce web application frontend
properties.purpose: Demonstrates the UI of the microservices-demo application

properties.description: Top navigation bar containing the OnlineBoutique logo, currency selector (USD), and shopping cart icon
Top banner displaying free shipping promotion: 'Free shipping with $75 purchase!'
Google Cloud branding badge in top-left area, indicating the app is a Google Cloud demo
Left-side hero image showing a white chair with folded clothing items on it, serving as a decorative visual element
Main product grid section titled 'Hot Products' displaying product cards in a 3-column grid layout
Product card for Sunglasses priced at $19.99
properties.name: Sunglasses

properties.description: Product card for a black Tank Top priced at $19.99
properties.name: Tank Top

properties.description: Product card for a Watch priced at $109.99
properties.name: Watch

properties.description: Product card for Loafers priced at $89.99
properties.name: Loafers

properties.description: Product card for a Hairdryer priced at $24.99
properties.name: Hairdryer

properties.description: Product card for a Candle Holder priced at $18.99
properties.name: Candle Holder

properties.description: Page uses a two-column layout: left side is a hero/branding image panel, right side is the product catalog grid
properties.layout_pattern: two-column split with hero image and product grid

properties.description: Products are displayed in a 3-column responsive grid layout with image, name, and price per card
Shopping cart and checkout UI for the Online Boutique e-commerce demo application
properties.purpose: Displays cart contents, shipping address form, and payment method form for order placement

properties.description: Left panel showing cart with 6 items, listing Watch (qty 1, $109.99) and Tank Top (qty 5, $94.95), shipping $17.21, total $222.15
Right panel form for entering shipping address with fields: Email Address, Street Address, Zip Code, City, State, Country
Payment form with credit card number, expiry month/year dropdowns, CVV field, and Place Order button
Product recommendation section at the bottom of the checkout page
Top navigation bar with Online Boutique logo, Google Cloud badge, currency selector (USD), and cart icon
Top banner advertising free shipping with $75 purchase

nodes.label: Folded Clothes on White Chair - E-commerce Product Image
nodes.description: A minimalist lifestyle photograph showing a stack of neatly folded clothing items (black top, black-and-white striped garment, dark teal knit, and light grey item) placed on a white Eames-style molded plastic chair with wooden dowel legs, set against a plain white background. Used as a product or hero image in the frontend of the Online Boutique microservices e-commerce demo application to represent clothing merchandise.
